task_completion.description: Log in to ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus as administrator
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent logged into the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus interface, indicated by an administrator profile or successful login from the login screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Change Advisory Board (CAB) configuration settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active screen shows the Admin or Settings section specifically for managing or creating Change Advisory Boards (CABs).

task_completion.description: Enter the CAB name 'Technical Infrastructure CAB'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Technical Infrastructure CAB' is visible in the CAB Name input field during creation.

task_completion.description: Enter the CAB description containing the required keywords
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description text box contains the text 'Responsible for reviewing and approving all high-impact network and server infrastructure changes.' (Look specifically for 'reviewing', 'approving', and 'infrastructure').

task_completion.description: Add David Chen as a member of the CAB
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'David Chen' is visible in the selected members list or is actively being added to the CAB members in the UI.

task_completion.description: Add Sarah Miller as a member of the CAB
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Sarah Miller' is visible in the selected members list or is actively being added to the CAB members in the UI.
A success message indicating the CAB was created, or the CAB list view showing 'Technical Infrastructure CAB' as a saved entry.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to configure the CAB
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and ManageEngine UI, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface matches ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus, not a generic text editor or a locally mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open in the screenshots used to artificially inject the CAB name or members into the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected CAB Name: 'Technical Infrastructure CAB'. Expected Members: 'David Chen' and 'Sarah Miller'. Expected Description Keywords: 'reviewing', 'approving', 'infrastructure'.
